title: Promise Workers, Backpressure, Abort Propagation, and Clean Drain · Compiler Case: Drain Proof
summary: Promise.all starts the whole frontier, one rejection abandons siblings, streams outlive jobs, and shutdown clears timers without awaiting owned work. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler ts drain proof increment in bounded abortable worker pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Stop admission, abort permitted work, await settlements, flush durable state, close resources, and inspect live handles.
Propagate cancellation into queued, fetching, parsing, browser, audit, writing, and retry operations and reject late results.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
